CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2007 Continued To May-11-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-19-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Richard Spotswood, Esq. for Plaintiff: Manubhai Tandel, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Steven Royston as follows:
General Damages $26,295.24
Special Damages $25,000.00, for a total of $51,295.24
Counsel to prepare Judgment.

April 19, 2007
Judgment signed by VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire.

Default Prove-Up In Scd.

Richard D. Spotswood, Esq. for Plaintiff: Manubhai Tandel, nor present.
Request for a continuance is granted in court.
Matter is continued to Mar. 22, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
